response.overview: When Norman helps Ash and Clarice move into their new home, the three of them accidentally unearth an old puppet with a life of its own. What begins as harmless curiosity soon descends into a nightmare as the puppet’s dark curse takes hold.  Curse of the Were-Puppet is a twisted love letter to 1980s VHS horror — blending practical effects, dark humour and handcrafted puppet terror.
response.tagline: Three friends. One move. No strings attached...
response.title: Curse of the Were-Puppet
